risk_title: Delays in DABS contractual processing affecting project implementation
risk_summary: DABS is experiencing delays in processing contractual obligations such as advance payments and technical document reviews, which could impact project timelines and contractor performance.
evidence_quote: There continue to be delays on the side of DABS in processing contractual obligations such as advance payments and review of technical documents.

risk_title: Insufficient female representation in Grievance Redress Committees
risk_summary: None of the established Grievance Redress Committees in the four districts have female members, limiting women's ability to openly register complaints and potentially creating social tensions in project-affected communities.
evidence_quote: Currently, as per the discussion with DABS, none of the GRCs established so far have a female member.

risk_title: Recruitment challenges for female safeguard staff in Herat
risk_summary: DABS has not completed recruitment of a female safeguard officer for Herat Office due to limited applications from female staff, potentially affecting women's engagement in safeguards processes and community relations.
evidence_quote: As per the project document, DABS has committed to hire one female safeguard officer in Herat. However, due to limited applications from female staff, this recruitment has not been completed.

risk_title: Delayed public information sessions on grievance mechanisms
risk_summary: Public information sessions to inform local communities about grievance services are not scheduled until May 2018, creating a gap in community awareness during early project implementation phases.
evidence_quote: To inform local communities about grievance service, the client shall conduct public information sessions among local people in all four districts. These information sessions on grievance should be initiated by May 2018.
